sourced.label: Sourced
sourced.expansion: Participants are pointing to outside sources to back up their claims.

factual_claims.label: Factual Claims
factual_claims.expansion: Participants are making claims that are theoretically possible to confirm.

first_person.label: First-Person
first_person.expansion: Participants are mostly speaking from direct, lived experience.

hearsay.label: Second-Hand
hearsay.expansion: Participants are mostly relaying what they heard from someone else.

misleading.label: Actively Misleading
misleading.expansion: Participants are stating things in ways likely to mislead a reader.

insightful.label: Insightful
insightful.expansion: Participants are adding meaningful new perspective to the topic.

on_topic.label: On Topic
on_topic.expansion: The discussion stays close to the source's subject.

chatty.label: Chatty
chatty.expansion: The discussion is on-topic but mostly small talk.

drifting.label: Drifting
drifting.expansion: The discussion is wandering away from the source's subject.

off_topic.label: Off Topic
off_topic.expansion: The discussion is no longer about the source's subject.

supportive.label: Supportive
supportive.expansion: Participants are mostly encouraging the topic, or each other.

neutral.label: Neutral
neutral.expansion: Participants are not taking a strong emotional stance.

critical.label: Critical
critical.expansion: Participants are mostly criticizing a topic, or each other.

oppositional.label: Oppositional
oppositional.expansion: Participants are taking adversarial stances toward the topic, or each other.

safe.label: Safe
safe.expansion: Moderation, web risk, image, and video checks all came back clean.

mild.label: Mild
mild.expansion: Minor concerns surfaced — review the Safety section for context.

caution.label: Caution
caution.expansion: Multiple signals worth a careful read — see the Safety section.

unsafe.label: Unsafe
unsafe.expansion: Strong signals of harmful content — open the Safety section for details.

truth.heading: Truth
truth.description: Whether participants are speaking from evidence, direct experience, or hearsay.

relevance.heading: Relevance
relevance.description: How closely the discussion stays on the subject of the source.

sentiment.heading: Sentiment
sentiment.description: The emotional register of the discussion.

safety.heading: Safety
safety.description: Moderation signals including web risk, image, video, and content checks.
